summary: TrackFlow is a personal productivity habit tracker web app built with React + TypeScript + Motoko. Users authenticate via Internet Identity (Google sign-in supported). Post-login, users land on a pricing page to choose a plan: Free (3 habits, basic checkbox analytics, no payment), Starter (₹149/month), or Premium (₹399/month or ₹3,199/year). Payment is via UPI only (yadavmannan007@okicici) — users submit a transaction ID for manual admin verification. Admin panel at /admin allows admins to verify payments, assign/change user plans, and manage coupon codes. Full features include Dashboard, Analytics, Activities, Habits, Profile pages, sidebar navigation, INR currency, charts (Recharts), CRUD operations, and responsive Indigo-themed design.
architectural_notes: Tech stack: React + TypeScript + Motoko (not Next.js/MongoDB/NextAuth)
Authentication: Internet Identity (supports Google, Apple, Microsoft passkeys)
Admin panel accessible via /admin URL, plan assignment done manually after UPI verification
known_issues: Login page renders blank; Internet Identity authentication not working on initial load

existing_features.title: Implement Internet Identity authentication. After successful login, redirect users to the pricing/plan selection page.

Create a pricing/plan selection page shown after login. Display three plans: Free (3 habits, basic checkbox analytics, no payment required — direct to dashboard), Starter (₹149/month), and Premium (₹399/month or ₹3,199/year). Free plan skips payment; paid plans proceed to the UPI payment flow.

Build a UPI payment page for Starter and Premium plans. Display UPI ID yadavmannan007@okicici with a QR code placeholder, an input field for the user to enter their UPI transaction ID, a coupon code input field with validation, and a Submit button. On submission, save the pending payment request (user ID, plan, transaction ID, coupon used, timestamp) to the backend with status 'pending'.

Build the Dashboard page (/dashboard) showing: welcome message with today's date, quick stats cards (Total Hours Today, Total Earnings Today in ₹, Productive Hours, Most Active Habit), an Add Activity form (activity name dropdown with add-new option, start/end time pickers with auto-calculated duration, productive checkbox, earnings in ₹, notes), Today's Timeline listing all activities for the selected date (each card shows time range, activity name, duration, earnings, productive badge, edit/delete icons), and Habit Progress Bars showing daily goal completion per habit.

Build the Analytics page (/analytics) with a date range selector (Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This Month), a Pie Chart for time distribution by activity, a Bar Chart for daily earnings trend, a Line Chart for productivity trend, and summary stats (average daily hours, total earnings, most productive day, top 3 activities). Starter plan users see normal analytics; Premium users see full analytics; Free users see only checkbox-style basic analytics.

Build the Activities page (/activities) with filter bar (date range, by habit, productive/unproductive), a table/list view with columns (Date, Activity, Duration, Earnings ₹, Productive, Actions), pagination (10 items per page), bulk delete, and Export to CSV button.

Build the Habits page (/habits) showing all user habits with Add/Edit/Delete functionality (name, goal type daily/weekly, goal value in hours, color picker). Display current streak per habit. Enforce plan limits: Free users capped at 3 habits; Starter at 10 habits; Premium unlimited. Show an upgrade prompt modal when the limit is exceeded.

Build the Profile page (/profile) showing Google/Internet Identity profile info, an editable phone number field, account statistics (member since, total activities logged, total tracked hours, total earnings in ₹), a Delete Account button with confirmation dialog, and an Export My Data button that downloads a JSON/CSV of the user's data.

Build the Admin Panel (/admin) accessible via URL. The admin panel must include: a pending payments queue showing user name, selected plan, submitted transaction ID, coupon used, and Approve/Reject buttons; a users table (name, principal, phone, plan, signup date, last login) with ability to manually change a user's plan; a coupon management section to create new coupons (code, discount %, usage limit, expiry date) and view/delete existing ones; and platform-wide stats (total users, total activities, active users today).

Implement a collapsible sidebar navigation with icons for: Dashboard (Home), Analytics (Chart), Activities (List), Habits (Checkbox), Profile (User). The Admin link (Shield icon) is only visible when the authenticated user has the admin role. Apply a consistent Indigo (#4f46e5) primary color theme with Inter/Poppins font, card components, toast notifications, and loading skeletons throughout. Footer reads '© {year} TrackFlow. All rights reserved.'

Apply a clean, modern productivity-app visual theme: deep Indigo (#4f46e5) primary with white card backgrounds, subtle gray surfaces, Inter/Poppins typography, generous spacing, and smooth micro-interactions (hover states, transitions). The design should feel professional and focused, suitable for a daily productivity tool.

Fix the LoginPage so it renders correctly on initial load without showing a blank screen. Ensure the Internet Identity authentication flow initializes properly, handles the AuthClient loading state, and displays the login UI (app name, tagline, and 'Login with Internet Identity' button) before any authentication check completes.

Audit and fix the App.tsx route tree and auth guard logic to ensure that unauthenticated users are correctly redirected to the login page and authenticated users are not blocked or redirected back to login. Fix any router initialization issues that may cause the entire app to render blank (e.g., missing router provider, incorrect route configuration, or premature auth checks before identity is resolved).

new_feature_requests.summary: Authentication via Internet Identity (Google sign-in option)
Free plan: 3 habits, basic checkbox analytics, skip payment
UPI payment (yadavmannan007@okicici) with transaction ID submission field
Coupon code field on payment page
Admin panel at /admin: verify UPI payments, approve/reject, assign plans, manage coupon codes, view all users
Dashboard page with quick stats, add activity form, today's timeline, and habit progress bars
Analytics page with date range selector, pie/bar/line charts, and summary stats
Activities page with filters, table view, pagination, bulk delete, CSV export
Habits page with add/edit/delete habits and streak tracking
Profile page with account stats, edit phone, delete account, export data
Upgrade prompt modal when free plan limits are exceeded
Collapsible sidebar navigation with icons, admin link visible only to admin

Implement backend data models and logic for: Users (principal, name, email, phone, role, plan, planExpiry, createdAt, lastLogin), Habits (userId, name, goalType, goalValue, color, createdAt), Activities (userId, habitId, customName, startTime, endTime, duration, isProductive, earnings, notes, date), PaymentRequests (userId, plan, billingCycle, transactionId, couponCode, status, submittedAt, verifiedAt), and Coupons (code, discountPercent, usageLimit, usedCount, expiresAt, createdAt).

Ensure the useInternetIdentity hook and useActor hook are correctly wired in the component tree so that the identity state is available to LoginPage and all protected pages on initial mount. Fix any context provider ordering issues in main.tsx that might prevent the identity from being accessible.
